backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the treatVET app, defining user profiles, services, and appointments with role-based access control (admin/user) and CRUD operations for each entity.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state by adding the new `birdsPoultry` variant to the ServiceCategory type, converting old service and appointment records to the new schema.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage branding, footer updates, Birds/Poultry category addition, etc.) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'treatVET – Veterinary Care Treatment' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with five routes (home, services, treatments, vaccination, contact) nested under a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: Controlled React form for booking appointments, supporting four animal categories including Birds/Poultry, with validation and dynamic service filtering by selected category.
frontend/src/components/BookingConfirmat: Displays a post-booking confirmation screen with appointment details (client name, phone, animal type, service, date, reference ID) and buttons to book another appointment or return home.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer showing the treatVET brand, quick navigation links, and contact/location information including a 24/7 emergency notice.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a sticky Navigation header, a main content area via Outlet, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive top navigation bar with desktop links, a 'Book Appointment' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu for the five main site routes.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Card component that displays a single veterinary service with its category and type badges, name, description, and formatted price.
frontend/src/components/ServiceFilters.t: Filter UI with pill-button groups for selecting animal category and service type, used to narrow down the services list.
frontend/src/components/TreatmentCategor: Accordion-based section that groups treatment services under a category header (icon, title, subtitle), expanding each service to show its description and price.
frontend/src/components/VaccinationEntry: Card component for a single vaccination service showing its name, description, a 'consult vet for schedule' note, and price per dose.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating services and appointments on the ICP backend, including queries for listing services/appointments and mutations for creating, booking, updating, and cancelling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a custom earthy green/warm neutral design token palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/ContactBookingPage.ts: Page component that displays a veterinary appointment booking form alongside contact/location info, handles form submission to the backend, and shows a confirmation screen on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component showcasing treatVET's animal care categories, key features, and a hero banner with emergency contact callout and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays all veterinary services in a filterable, searchable grid with category and type filters, loading skeletons, and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/TreatmentManagementPa: Shows treatment services grouped by animal category (pets, large/small ruminants, birds) using TreatmentCategorySection components with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/VaccinationPage.tsx: Displays vaccination services organized by animal category with styled category headers, an info banner, and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/appointmentHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions for generating appointment/service IDs, converting between JS Date and ICP nanosecond timestamps, and formatting prices and dates.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of a veterinary clinic website project (treatVET) including architecture notes, feature list, image requirements, and known issues across multiple build versions.
